title: Totem Cross
description: replace the texture and the sound of the totem playing.
body:
### The resourcepack replaces the soundtrack with a prayer and the totem texture with a cross!
Tired of boring totems? Want to be saved by prayer? Then you should try this cross totem, with which you will not be bored.

Now your game will become much more fun and atmospheric with this resourcepack.

[Video](https://vt.tiktok.com/ZS2J6YhuG/)

![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/834485419361662ef4de710348b4b9362e9a0fa6.png)
